title: Love Aaj Kal
tmdbOverview: When professional ambitions clash with personal feelings for a modern-day couple, a love story from a bygone era may offer some wisdom.
synopsis: Love Aaj Kal is a 2020 romance and drama film from India. It has a 4.7 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12A certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
